lead: This machine uses cz, at, and reset. The at line also changes with the suru count, so set both before reading the checker.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep cz, at, and reset on separate lines.

summaryBoxes.label: Note
summaryBoxes.value: The at line uses suru count from 0 to 2.

factTable: Set both route and suru count first.

sections.title: How to use
body: Use cz when the current table should be read as cz.
Use at only after the suru count is also fixed.

sections.title: Memo
body: This machine is easy to misread if the route is vague.
When the count is unclear, stay on the safer side.
